name: nitrograph
description: Search engine for agent commerce: find, rank, inspect, and call agent-usable APIs across x402, MPP, and paid service rails with Nitrograph MCP discovery, call cards, and outcome reporting.

interface.longDescription: Use Nitrograph as Codex's search engine for agent commerce when it needs to find, compare, inspect, or call an API/service for a task. Nitrograph discovers ranked agent-usable APIs, shows pricing and health, fetches task-aware call cards with endpoint guidance, handles x402/MPP payment challenges correctly, and reports successful or failed service outcomes so future searches improve.
defaultPrompt: Use Nitrograph as the search engine for agent commerce to find the best API for this task.
Use Nitrograph to find the best API for this task, inspect the top result, and show me the call card.
Find a lead generation API and show the best options with pricing.
Find an image generation service under $0.05 per call.
Find a data enrichment API, inspect the top result, and show me the call card.
Compare x402 services for web search and show pricing, health, and gotchas.
